body_txt: This is pretty simple: weapons getting pulled out of people. In some settings, it's only one or two people who can do it; in others, it's just the way things are. In some cases, the weapon's appearance and type will be based on the personality of who it's coming out of. Not to be confused with a character using a weapon they had been stabbed with . Related to Equippable Ally and Retractable Weapon . See also Spontaneous Weapon Creation and Human Pack Mule . Compare Stomach of Holding and Treasure Chest Cavity .
